subcodes.first_line: Whosoever attaineth, in this Day, unto the living waters of the knowledge of the Beloved of all existence is, verily, accounted among the people of Paradise in the presence of the Throne [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: هر نفسی الیوم بکوثر عرفان محبوب امکان فائز شد او از اهل فردوس لدی العرش مذکور
subcodes.subjects: @high station of the true believer, @role and station of women, @praise and encouragement
